reviews.review_title: If you are keen on rage quitting
reviews.review_description: This game becomes infuriating as if you leave the game and come back later all your weapons you’ve bought disappear. Also the loading of guns is a dumpster fire at the best of times with no auto loading option. When playing co op mode I had a tough time keeping my left hand on my body. It spent half the time disappearing until killed. Then you got it back. Having no hand makes it extremely hard to load the already poor loading system. If devs could fix this then I would give it 5 stars

developer_response.body:
Hi G_Star1981,

Thank you very much for your feedback. Regarding the checkpoint issue, we are currently working on improving it, and a fix will be included in the next major patch coming very soon (along with tons of other game improvements). As for the reloading system and the hand glitch (the latter is actually the first time we've heard about it), we would love to know more so we can fix it. We invite you to join our community Discord and share more details in our feedback section.

We want to make this game as good as possible based on your feedback, and that's why we keep working hard on it. Thank you so much!

reviews.review_description:
The game mechanics need some work.  The gun loading system is so poor compared to other games of this type. 
The 50 waves whilst handy that it saves progress at certain stages, all goes out the window when you load game back up and you no longer have the weapon you had at the save point.  
Doesn’t appear to be any way to purchase weapons before starting a game. 
If you don’t have a decent gun anything from level 25 is impossible as the standard handgun is shockingly bad and as previously stated weapon reloading mechanics are dreadful. 
Also even in easy the jump in speed and numbers of enemy after wave 25 is insane considering there’s 50 waves. It’s a shame as it has the potential to be good.

developer_response.body:
Hi ZonkedQuill74,

Thank you for your review. A new patch will be released soon with a ton of improvements for the game, and we are currently working on fixing the inventory issue after loading a saved game. Regarding the reloading system, we would love to know more about it. You can leave us more detailed feedback on our Discord in the feedback section.

As for purchasing weapons, you need to have a Weapon Forger to do so. To get an advantage with this, you can use Tycho, who carries an SMG as a character passive ability.

Regarding the waves, they will all be rebalanced in the next major patch, and the enemy system will change; there will now be more enemies that are easier to kill, allowing you to get cash faster. The main handgun is now more effective and deals more damage, as does Malachi's revolver.

We keep working day after day to improve A Long Survive. Thank you so much for your support!

reviews.review_description:
My first review was just yo help me cope whith the fact i went past the refund stage😭.i realy wanted to like this game buuuuuuuuuut...
THIS IS JUST A MOBILE IN VR VRO😭🥀

developer_response.body:
Hi ChillGuy828,

We understand that A Long Survive might not be for everyone, but our small team has put a tremendous amount of effort into getting here and being able to launch it. Our goal is to keep improving the game day after day and make it the best experience possible for everyone by listening to all feedback and working hard on it.

We really wish this review had been a bit more constructive, letting us know what we could improve or what you liked the least.

We will soon be releasing a major update with a huge number of changes and game improvements, and we hope you can give us another chance in the future.

Thank you for your review.

reviews.review_title: A Promising Gem in the Making
reviews.review_description:
This game truly feels like an unpolished gem — full of potential and already quite enjoyable to play. The core gameplay is solid, and the theme is fantastic; it really pulls you into its world.

There’s definitely room for improvement, especially in the UI and a few gameplay elements. The gun firing animation could use a bit more realism, and some of the alien textures might benefit from sharper detail. Enemy animations, especially death animations, could also be refined to enhance immersion.

That said, the overall graphics are smooth and perform well, and it’s clear that there’s a strong foundation here. I’m genuinely excited to see how the developers continue to polish and expand the experience.

I’ve already added it to my wishlist and recommended it to friends — we’re all looking forward to playing it together once it’s further developed.

Dear developers: please keep nurturing this project! With careful optimization and attention to detail, A Long Survive has the potential to become one of the standout titles on the Quest 3.

I will return back and update the review after few patches.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We’re really happy to hear your feedback, thank you so much for your kind words and for the suggestions you shared with us. We’ve taken note of everything and completely agree that those are areas we can improve.

Please stay tuned for the upcoming patches we’ll be improving the tutorial, UI, and overall quality on Quest 3.

You can also join our Discord community to stay up to date with all the latest updates and news!

Thank you so much again, and please don’t forget about us! 💚

reviews.review_description:
After a long time waiting for a good quality game I found this master piece through the store and it looks amazing in my Quest 3!

The gameplay is so addictive, and the visuals are just incredible even with all the enemies that appears at the same time!

Keep up the good work! 💙💯

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the kind words! We have even more coming soon, make sure to check out our Roadmap on the Store page. 🤝

reviews.review_description:
Initial impressions here after the tutorial.

Feels rough and unfinished but is most of the way there. It needs some fixes and more clarity of function.

Menu interactions are a gamble. If you're lucky the button you're trying to press will actually activate. It isn't exactly intuitive with a tutorial that sort of tells you what to do next, like go buy something, but stops at telling you about the button selection process. And when I tried to pick up my ammo box it fell on the ground and just left me hanging with no ammo. Waving my hand around until the box was highlighted still didn't let me pick it up. Eventually managed to grab by crouching physically and highlighting it.

Inventory system seems clunky but that's probably something you can get used to. However with the failure of button presses, simply not reliable enough.

Weapons feel lame and underpowered with poor audio. Very disappointing tbh.

The tutorial doesn't actually let you fight waves of enemies to get a feel for the gameplay, it just tells you how to click and move a beacon and such. So it doesn't really teach you the overall strategy. That could do with some fleshing out.

The training room lets you spawn any weapon type but it wouldn't actually fire the energy weapon I tried to test. So not much of a training room tbh.

Then came the thing that bugged me most. The game is advertised as a co-op shooter with the ability to play single player. I want to play single player to learn the ropes but the console only gave the option to join public matches and didn't have a single player or a create lobby option etc that made it easy to set up a game for myself. It shouldn't be difficult to have a straightforward choice.

Overall I'd say it shouldn't have been released quite yet without some polish. If the menu interactions and options actually worked and made it easy to select what you want, it would be possible to properly explore gameplay but for now it is not worth my time playing it again.

developer_response.body:
Hi Krykoyd! Thank you so much for the feedback you shared in your comment, we’ve taken note of everything you mentioned, and we’ve already added several of your suggestions to our task list for the upcoming patches.

We’re currently working on improving the tutorial, UI, and overall quality on Quest 3. We’re also updating the tutorial to include clearer explanations on how to start matches and navigate the in-game menus. Our goal is to make the experience smoother and more intuitive for every player.

Please stay tuned for our next patches and feel free to join our Discord community to keep up with all the updates and everything we’re working on. We’re constantly improving A Long Survive every single day.

Thanks again for your comment, and we hope to see you back in A Long Survive soon! 💚

reviews.review_description: It looks like a Quest 1 game — no feedback at all when you shoot, terrible animations… honestly, I can’t understand how a game like this can be released in 2025 on Quest 3.

developer_response.body:
Hi! Thanks for your feedback.

The game includes haptic feedback and weapon recoil, and its visual style is designed to keep a stable performance even with the large number of enemies and structures on screen.

We’re already working on a visual update optimized for Quest 3 to take advantage of its extra power.

If you’d like to share ideas or help us make the game even better, feel free to join our Discord community. We’d love to hear from you!

reviews.review_description: Some issues with the guns and audio but once the Devs release an update or two it will become an all time favorite. Multiplayer is addictive and isn’t a mindless shooter but encourages strategy. Having a lot of fun so far and I can’t wait for future updates!

developer_response.body:
Hi Flyslams!

Thank you so much for your comment we’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the game! 💚
We’re working hard on upcoming updates, focusing on improvements based on all the feedback we’ve been receiving.

If you’re not already part of our Discord community, we highly recommend joining you’ll be able to see all the latest updates and improvements as we roll them out!

Thanks again for all your support! 🙌

reviews.review_description: Not to easy hope you fix the guns tho and the humanoid enemies dont seem to attack properly or get hit by the turrets the priming sucks thats my only issue give me the ability to grab the primer with the trigger id be ok with that love this game don't let this one die from idoits in the reviews

developer_response.body:
Hey deaddevilking! 👋

We’re really glad to hear that you’re enjoying the game! 💚
We’re also working on improving the weapon feedback, including better sounds and particle effects. Plus, we’ll be looking into the trigger behavior for the first grab, just like you mentioned.

If you’re not already part of our Discord community, we highly recommend joining it’s the best way to stay up to date on new updates and help us make A Long Survive even better.

See you out there, survivor! ⚡

reviews.review_description:
I love the game it's just whenever I get on   there's no one on.

Four stars

developer_response.body:
Hi Smith.2702! Thank you so much for playing our game and for your review.
Just to clarify, whenever someone starts a match, that match becomes invisible to others because it’s not possible to join once it has already begun that’s why it may look like fewer people are playing.
Even so, we’re working hard to keep growing our community and to improve A Long Survive as much as possible so our player base can continue to expand.

Thank you again, and see you on the battlefield!

reviews.review_description: The game seems very well done, has some good amount of content and overall nice, just not my type of game honestly. I would still recommend checking it out if it seems cool!

developer_response.body: Hey Geohl! Thank you very much, we really appreciate your review. Hopefully, with the incoming updates, we'll see you again among us. 🤝

reviews.review_description: Game is super fun to play with friends excited for the PVP and team death match and search and destroy modes that will be coming soon check out the roadmap !!!

developer_response.body:
Hey SlimenarcoVR1!

Thank you so much for the review and the kind words - we are really happy that you had a bunch of fun!

More coming soon! 💪

Hey FarmerV241.0! 👋

I’m really glad to hear you’re enjoying A Long Survive! 
All feedback is valuable to us so if there’s anything else you’d like to share, feel free to join our Discord community.
We also post updates there about what we’re working on for upcoming patches.

Thank you so much for your support!
